title: Scholars @ WCM — Design Spec (Phase 1)
summary: Phase 1 UI/UX design specification for the Scholars Profile System (VIVO replacement) covering seven page types, five role categories, components, data sources, and algorithmic surface rules.
scope: data sources (Enterprise Directory, reciter-db, DynamoDB/ReCiterAI, Jenzabar, COI)
notes: Manifest-declared SPEC with precedence 1; treated as locked UI/UX contract per orchestrator instructions even though SPEC type itself does not set locked=true.
